name: freelayer
description: Serverless private communication. Sovereign rooms. Encrypted capsules. No central backend.

scripts.check:all: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm check:build-zero-egress && pnpm check:doc-links && pnpm check:contributor-workflow && pnpm check:policy-docs && pnpm audit:privacy && pnpm audit:security && pnpm audit:supply-chain
scripts.audit:privacy: pnpm run check:no-external-assets && pnpm run check:no-telemetry && pnpm run check:no-forbidden-storage && pnpm run check:no-forbidden-network && pnpm run check:no-network-deps && pnpm run check:no-metadata-bypass && pnpm run check:no-notification-bypass && pnpm run check:policy-matrix && pnpm run check:policy-conflicts && pnpm run check:boundaries
scripts.audit:security: node -e "console.log('[audit:security] Baseline only: see audit:privacy checks and docs/SECURITY_REVIEW_CHECKLIST.md. Dedicated security-regression suite arrives with implementation phases (docs/ROADMAP.md Phase 10).'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.audit:supply-chain: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || echo "[audit:supply-chain] pnpm audit reported issues. Dependency rules: docs/DEPENDENCY_POLICY.md."
